name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Monogram Bucket Bag. Elegant and classic, with blue oblique monogram fabric, the unique bucket shape looks like a money bag!
Features a rotating D-letter opening CD lock; tightening the opening ensures high security, while loosening it gives a casual, lazy feel. Both the short and long shoulder straps are adjustable and detachable. The rigid base gives it a more three-dimensional look, maximizing the atmosphere!
Mainly achieving bag freedom, sisters, go for it!
